Condition__c: Account SIC Code in ineligible list
Action__c: Block quote with ineligible industry message
Set Rate Level to Level 2 and use Level 2 rates
Block quote - minimum 2 eligible employees required

Condition__c: Plan is Deluxe 100 AND enrolled count less than 5
Action__c: Block Deluxe 100 - not available for groups of 2-4

Condition__c: Employer contribution 100% AND eligible employee not enrolled
Action__c: Block - all eligible must enroll when 100% employer paid

Condition__c: Contribution 75-99% AND enrolled less than MAX(75% eligible or 5)
Action__c: Warn - insufficient participation - pend for UW review

Condition__c: Contribution 50-74% AND enrolled less than MAX(50% eligible or 5)
Contribution less than 50% AND enrolled less than 5 (or 2 for 2-4 groups)
Action__c: Block voluntary plan if minimum not met

Condition__c: Group 2-4 employer-paid or voluntary 2-49 AND annual max exceeds limit
Action__c: Restrict annual max picklist to available values

Condition__c: Ortho selected AND enrolled count less than 5
Action__c: Block orthodontics - not available for groups of 2-4

Condition__c: Voluntary plan AND enrolled less than 50 AND adult ortho selected
Action__c: Block adult ortho - requires 50+ enrolled for voluntary

Condition__c: Dual choice selected AND enrolled count less than 5
Action__c: Block dual choice - requires 5+ enrolled employees

Condition__c: Dual choice AND either plan has less than 2 enrolled
Action__c: Warn - minimum 2 enrolled per plan in dual choice

Condition__c: Group size is 2 AND both are dependent relationship
Action__c: Block - group of 2 cannot be dependent relationship

Condition__c: Core/BuyUp AND employer contribution less than 50%
